messages.content: Moksh, Elon Musk is a South African-born American entrepreneur known for founding SpaceX and Tesla, and co-founding PayPal, with a net worth that has fluctuated but has made him one of the richest people in the world. He is focused on making space travel and electric vehicles more advanced and affordable, and is also working on sustainable energy solutions and artificial intelligence.

Moksh, Elon Musk's current net worth is estimated to be around $839 billion, making him the richest person in the world, with his wealth primarily coming from his ownership of Tesla and SpaceX, as well as other ventures such as X, formerly known as Twitter.
who is Elon Musk best friend

Moksh, Elon Musk's closest friends include Peter Thiel, Joe Rogan, and his brother Kimbal Musk, with Peter Thiel being a particularly close friend and associate, having co-founded PayPal with Musk and serving as a mentor and advisor to him.
do you remember the game I love the most
Moksh, I recall that your favorite game is eFootball, and you're quite skilled at it too, having discussed tips and strategies with me in the past.
can you tell me which new cards are coming in a

what happened between Bangladesh and Pakistan during this T20
Moksh, in the 2nd T20I between Bangladesh and Pakistan, Bangladesh won by 6 wickets, with Pakistan losing the match despite a competitive performance from their team.
who won the World Cup T20

Moksh, in the 2022 ICC Men's T20 World Cup, England won the tournament by defeating Pakistan in the final, but I don't have information about the specific match between Bangladesh and Pakistan, however, I can tell you that Pakistan won against Bangladesh in their group stage match by 5 wickets.
I am asking who won the T20 world cup in 2026
Moksh, India won the 2026 ICC Men's T20 World Cup, defeating New Zealand in the final by a record margin of 96 runs.
